title: ASR Outdoor Pocket Sport Belt for Running Jogging Travel Fanny Pack Black
description:
The ASR Outdoor sport waist belt features two 8” expanding pockets that will conveniently store your daily essentials while jogging, running, traveling or exercising. It will easily fit most smartphones, mobile devices, cash, keys and more. Our sport belt is both adjustable and stretchy, and comes with a side release paracord buckle designed for easy one-handed release so you can grab your essentials while still moving. It adjusts from 27” to 43” and weighs just 2.2 ounces, making it easy to wear and carry for most men, women and children. Made of high-quality breathable materials, this belt also features reflective strips and a reinforced zipper to ensure that your items are secured, making it an ideal option for cycling, hiking, boating and exercising in low-light conditions.

  • SPECIFICATIONS - Belt length: 27” to 43” (adjustable, one size fits most); Reflective strips; Reinforced zipper; 8” expanding pocket; Materials: breathable; Buckle dimensions: 1.5”; Color: black; Number of pockets: 2
